enterprise.name: Enterprise Engineering
enterprise.description: Full engineering team for complex backends and full-stack apps.
enterprise.best_for: Complex apps, APIs, data pipelines, internal tools

saas-product.name: SaaS Product
saas-product.description: Full-stack engineering optimized for product development. Security, testing, and performance built in.
saas-product.best_for: SaaS products, B2B/B2C apps, dashboards, subscription products

internal-tool.name: Internal Tool
internal-tool.description: Full engineering with DevOps for internal deployment. Reliability and maintainability focused.
internal-tool.best_for: Admin panels, internal dashboards, developer tools, back-office apps

game-interactive.name: Game / Interactive
game-interactive.description: Engineering focused on performance-critical interactive experiences. 60fps target.
game-interactive.best_for: Games, interactive experiences, creative tools, canvas-heavy apps

marketing-site.name: Marketing Site
marketing-site.description: Frontend-only engineering for static sites. Performance and code quality focused.
marketing-site.best_for: Landing pages, marketing sites, pricing pages, product launches
